_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Allure reports & summaries missing for make-based test categories

steps.description: Fix orch/test_runner.py: extract command-rewrite into a pure _build_run_command helper; inject PYTEST_ADDOPTS='--alluredir=<run-scoped>' for make commands so pytest emits Allure results; persist run.allure_report_dir only after _generate_allure_report succeeds.

Per-agent review of S01: PYTEST_ADDOPTS injection correctness (run-scoped, append-safe, quoted, make-only), allure_report_dir gated on report generation, helper purity, quality-run safety, scope, TDD RED evidence.

Unit tests for _build_run_command (make->PYTEST_ADDOPTS reproduction, pytest-direct no-duplicate, append-safety, passthrough) + integration test asserting allure_report_dir set only when a report is generated (NULL otherwise).

Review S03 coverage: reproduction targets the bug, semantic assertions (specific --alluredir value, exact NULL-vs-set persistence), both command shapes + both persistence cases covered, testcontainer/isolation rules.
Global cross-agent review: completeness vs AC1-AC3, integration correctness, no cross-cutting breakage (quality runs, dashboard), full-suite green, scope confined to orch/test_runner.py.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
